function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Northstar design-partner invoices
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to your design partner / Northstar work:

- INV-0001, issued 2025-11-03
- INV-0002, issued 2025-12-01

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Verified outbound email semantics: both attachment paths were read exactly, and recipient matches canonical Miles entity file. Next complete workflow by deleting processed inbox item, then report completion.
Task completed: inbox item processed into outbound email draft and inbox file deleted. Ready to report with only files actually read as grounding.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by drafting a reply email to Miles with the two oldest invoices linked to the Northstar design-partner work attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, inspected 99_system, used inbox and email workflows, verified recipient via canonical entity record, and used exact read attachment paths in the outbound email record.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested a reply with the oldest two invoices linked to the design partner. Canonical finance evidence in 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md and 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md established the two oldest matching invoices, and 10_entities/cast/miles.md established the canonical recipient address miles@novak.example. The required outbound draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox per the sending-email workflow, and the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
